title: perdicium lyratum
intro: Perdicium lyratum, also known as the African bird's eye thorn or African bird's eye, is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. It is traditionally used in African folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Perdicium lyratum include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Perdicium lyratum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
